item.title: EDEN (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 28B License: closed Type: model "EDEN (environmentally-derived evolutionary network) family of metagenomic foundation models, including a 28 billion parameter model trained on 9.7 trillion nucleotide tokens from BaseData1 . This dataset, at the time of training, contained more than 10 billion novel genes from over 1 million new species, and is intentionally enriched for environmental and host-associated metagenomes, phage sequences, and mobile genetic elements, enabling the model to learn from diverse and novel cross-species evolutionary mechanisms and apply them to key challenges in human health."

item.title: mHC 27B (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: closed Type: model 27BA4.14B. Scaling tested with 3B MoE on 1T tokens=334:1. "Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), a general framework that projects the residual connection space of HC onto a specific manifold to restore the identity mapping property, while incorporating rigorous infrastructure optimization to ensure efficiency. Empirical experiments demonstrate that mHC is effective for training at scale, offering tangible performance improvements and superior scalability."

item.title: Ranke-4B (UZH)
item.description: Parameters: 4B License: closed Type: model Base Model: Qwen 3. 600B tokens of pre-(1913, 1929, 1933, 1939, 1946) data only.

item.title: TimesFM-ICF (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.2B License: closed Type: model TimesFM-ICF is 6.8% more accurate than TimesFM (Base). Time-series forecasting only. 'a large pretraining corpus of 100B real world time-points' may be more than 100B tokens.

item.title: KAT-V1-200B (Kuaishou)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model 200BA40B. In training as of Jul/2025. "to address the overthinking problem in reasoning-intensive tasks"

item.title: DeepTransformers (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: closed Type: model "Atlas, a long-term memory module with high capacity that learns to memorize the context by optimizing the memory based on the current and past tokens, overcoming the online nature of long-term memory models. Building on this insight, we present a new family of Transformer-like architectures, called DeepTransformers, that are strict generalizations of the original Transformer architecture."

item.title: Atlas (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: closed Type: model "Atlas, a long-term memory module with high capacity that learns to memorize the context by optimizing the memory based on the current and past tokens, overcoming the online nature of long-term memory models. Building on this insight, we present a new family of Transformer-like architectures, called DeepTransformers, that are strict generalizations of the original Transformer architecture."

item.title: Pangu Ultra MoE (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 718B License: closed Type: model 718B-A39B. Trained on 6,000 Ascend NPUs (Kunpeng 920 processors in Huawei Atlas 800T A2 servers).

item.title: Llama 4 Behemoth (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 2000B License: closed Type: model 2T-A288B. Announced Apr/2025, abandoned Jul/2025. "We also trained a teacher model, Llama 4 Behemoth, that outperforms GPT-4.5, Claude Sonnet 3.7, and Gemini 2.0 Pro on STEM-focused benchmarks such as MATH-500 and GPQA Diamond... 288B active parameters, 16 experts, and nearly two trillion total parameters."

item.title: Gemini Robotics (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model Gemini 2.0 Pro (cloud). "The second model is Gemini Robotics, a state-of-theart Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model that connects strong embodied reasoning priors to dexterous low-level control of real-world robots to solve challenging manipulation tasks. As a generalist VLA, Gemini Robotics can perform a wide array of diverse and complicated tasks, while also closely following language guidance and generalizing to distribution shifts in instructions, visuals, and motions. To emphasize the flexibility and generality of the Gemini Robotics models, we also introduce an optional specialization stage, which demonstrates how Gemini Robotics can be adapted for extreme dexterity, for advanced reasoning in difficult generalization settings, and for controlling completely new robot embodiments."

item.title: Gemini Robotics-ER (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: closed Type: model Gemini 2.0 Flash (on device). "The first model is Gemini Robotics-ER, a VLM with strong embodied reasoning capabilities at its core, exhibiting generalization across a wide range of embodied reasoning tasks while also maintaining its core foundation model capabilities. Gemini Robotics-ER exhibits strong performance on multiple capabilities critical for understanding the physical world, ranging from 3D perception to detailed pointing to robot state estimation and affordance prediction via code."

item.title: S2 (Figure)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: closed Type: model Likely based on OpenVLA 7B (Jun/2024, based on Llama 2 7B) or Molmo 7B-O (Sep/2024, based on OLMo-7B-1024 with OpenAI CLIP). "high quality, multi-robot, multi-operator dataset of diverse teleoperated behaviors, ~500 hours in total. To generate natural language-conditioned training pairs, we use an auto-labeling VLM to generate hindsight instructions. The VLM processes segmented video clips from the onboard robot cameras, prompted with: "What instruction would you have given the robot to get the action seen in this video?" All items handled during training are excluded from evaluations to prevent contamination. Architecture Our system comprises two main components: S2, a VLM backbone, and S1, a latent-conditional visuomotor transformer. S2 is built on a 7B-parameter open-source, open-weight VLM pretrained on internet-scale data. It processes monocular robot images and robot state information (consisting of wrist pose and finger positions) after projecting them into vision-language embedding space. Combined with natural language commands specifying desired behaviors, S2 distills all semantic task-relevant information into a single continuous latent vector, passed to S1 to condition its low-level actions. S1, an 80M parameter cross-attention encoder-decoder transformer, handles low-level control. It relies on a fully convolutional, multi-scale vision backbone for visual processing, initialized from pretraining done entirely in simulation. While S1 receives the same image and state inputs as S2, it processes them at a higher frequency to enable more responsive closed-loop control. The latent vector from S2 is projected into S1's token space and concatenated with visual features from S1's vision backbone along the sequence dimension, providing task conditioning. S1 outputs full upper body humanoid control at 200hz, including desired wrist poses, finger flexion and abduction control, and torso and head orientation targets. We append to the action space a synthetic "percentage task completion" action, allowing Helix to predict its own termination condition, which makes it easier to sequence multiple learned behaviors."

item.title: S1 (Figure)
item.description: Parameters: 0.08B License: closed Type: model "high quality, multi-robot, multi-operator dataset of diverse teleoperated behaviors, ~500 hours in total. To generate natural language-conditioned training pairs, we use an auto-labeling VLM to generate hindsight instructions. The VLM processes segmented video clips from the onboard robot cameras, prompted with: "What instruction would you have given the robot to get the action seen in this video?" All items handled during training are excluded from evaluations to prevent contamination. Architecture Our system comprises two main components: S2, a VLM backbone, and S1, a latent-conditional visuomotor transformer. S2 is built on a 7B-parameter open-source, open-weight VLM pretrained on internet-scale data. It processes monocular robot images and robot state information (consisting of wrist pose and finger positions) after projecting them into vision-language embedding space. Combined with natural language commands specifying desired behaviors, S2 distills all semantic task-relevant information into a single continuous latent vector, passed to S1 to condition its low-level actions. S1, an 80M parameter cross-attention encoder-decoder transformer, handles low-level control. It relies on a fully convolutional, multi-scale vision backbone for visual processing, initialized from pretraining done entirely in simulation. While S1 receives the same image and state inputs as S2, it processes them at a higher frequency to enable more responsive closed-loop control. The latent vector from S2 is projected into S1's token space and concatenated with visual features from S1's vision backbone along the sequence dimension, providing task conditioning. S1 outputs full upper body humanoid control at 200hz, including desired wrist poses, finger flexion and abduction control, and torso and head orientation targets. We append to the action space a synthetic "percentage task completion" action, allowing Helix to predict its own termination condition, which makes it easier to sequence multiple learned behaviors."

item.title: GPT-4b (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: closed Type: model Protein sequence model. "The model was trained on examples of protein sequences from many species, as well as information on which proteins tend to interact with one another. While that’s a lot of data, it’s just a fraction of what OpenAI’s flagship chatbots were trained on, making GPT-4b an example of a “small language model” that works with a focused data set." https://www.technologyreview.com/2025/01/17/1110086/openai-has-created-an-ai-model-for-longevity-science/

item.title: EON-8B (LinkedIn)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: closed Type: model "We found the EON-8B model (a domain-adapted Llama 3.1-8B variant) to be 75x and 6x cost effective in comparison to GPT-4 and GPT-4o respectively (Figure 4)... On tasks seen during training, the EON-8B model outperformed base Llama-3-8B-Instruct and its performance was comparable to SOTA GPT models."

item.title: o1-2024-12-17 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model "o1-2024-12-17 sets new state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks, improving cost-efficiency and performance."

item.title: 1T (Cerebras)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: closed Type: model "For Sandia’s trillion parameter training run, Cerebras configured a 55 terabyte MemoryX device."

item.title: Bi-Mamba (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: closed Type: model Unreleased, but will be replicated. "a scalable and powerful 1-bit Mamba architecture designed for more efficient large language models"

item.title: SFR-LLaMA-3.1-70B-Judge (Salesforce)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model Code coming soon: https://github.com/SalesforceAIResearch/SFRJudge "we opt to focus on datasets that evaluate modern (2023 and beyond) LLM responses, as older datasets likely contain lower quality responses from less capable models, with correspondingly stale annotations. We supplement human-annotated data with synthetically generated data to endow our judge models with specific capabilities (e.g., following fine-grained rubrics in evaluation)"

item.title: Unnamed 1T (China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute)
item.category: China Telecom Artificial Intelligence Research Institute
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: closed Type: model Trained on Chinese GPUs: "Ascend Atlas 800T A2 training server – a Huawei product listed as supporting the Kunpeng 920 7265 or Kunpeng 920 5250 processors" https://www.theregister.com/2024/10/02/china_telecom_model_trained_local_tech/

item.title: o1-preview (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model

item.title: LTM-2-mini (Magic)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: closed Type: model Context=100M tokens equals ~10 million lines of code or ~750 novels.

item.title: SpreadsheetLLM (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1760B License: closed Type: model Notable finetune of GPT4-0125-preview "outperforming the vanilla approach by 25.6% in GPT4’s in-context learning setting"

item.title: FLAMe (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 24B License: closed Type: model LLM-as-a-Judge autorater. Foundational Large Autorater Models (FLAMe). Uses an instruction-tuned PaLM-2-24B model. Unrelated to Microsoft FLAME Jan/2023.

item.title: Causal Axioms (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 0.067B License: closed Type: model "the training dataset follows a specific structure, we develop a custom tokenizer. Alphanumeric node names are tokenized at a character level, while special terms such as ‘causes’, ‘Does’, ‘cause’, ‘Yes’, and ‘No’ are tokenized at the word level... Our training setup consists of around 175k instances of sequential chains with size of chains ranging from 3 to 6 nodes... All models are trained for 100 epochs. [LifeArchitect.ai estimate is 12 tokens per node x 6 nodes x 175,000 instances x 100 epochs = 1.26B tokens]" Based on GPT-2 arch.

item.title: CriticGPT (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model "LLM Critics Help Catch LLM Bugs" Announce: https://openai.com/index/finding-gpt4s-mistakes-with-gpt-4/

item.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model MMLU=90.4 with prompting. Model card: https://www-cdn.anthropic.com/fed9cc193a14b84131812372d8d5857f8f304c52/Model_Card_Claude_3_Addendum.pdf

item.title: GPT-4o (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model gpt-4o-2024-05-13 no longer easily available, so hidden in the Model Table rankings. Omnimodel. ‘[GPT-4o is] likely an early checkpoint of GPT-5’. https://twitter.com/drjimfan/status/1790089671365767313 ELO: https://twitter.com/LiamFedus/status/1790064963966370209 Demo: https://youtu.be/DQacCB9tDaw

item.title: xLSTM (ELLIS)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: closed Type: model New method LSTM to xLSTM, see also RNNs. Code/weights doesn't seem to be released. https://github.com/AI-Guru/xlstm-resources

item.title: Med-Gemini-L 1.0 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model Med-Gemini-M 1.0 and Med-Gemini-L 1.0 (Pro and Ultra finetunes) "For language tasks that require less complex reasoning, such as summarizing medical notes and creating referral letters, we introduce Med-Gemini-M 1.0 by fine-tuning the Gemini 1.0 Pro model. For other tasks that require more advanced reasoning, we introduce Med-Gemini-L 1.0 by fine-tuning the Gemini 1.0 Ultra model using a self-training method to enable the models to efficiently use web search."

item.title: HLAT (Amazon)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: closed Type: model HLAT=High-quality LLM pre-trained on AWS Trainium. Same arch as Llama 7B. The pre-training is performed up to 64 Amazon EC2 trn1.32xlarge instances with totalling up to 1024 AWS Trainium accelerators. Read more about Trainium: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/aws/what-you-need-to-know-about-the-aws-ai-chips-powering-amazons-partnership-with-anthropic

item.title: ReALM-3B (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model FLAN-T5 (Oct/2022) finetune.

item.title: MM1 (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: closed Type: model VLM, outperforms Flamingo 80B (Apr/2022) across benchmarks. 2T text tokens + ~10B+ other text (estimate). Unreleased.

item.title: 530B (ByteDance)
item.description: Parameters: 530B License: closed Type: model Trained using 12,288 A100 GPUs, replicating MT-NLG size

item.title: 175B (ByteDance)
item.description: Parameters: 175B License: closed Type: model Trained using 12,288 A100 GPUs, replicating GPT-3 size

item.title: Ask (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: closed Type: model Internal employee model only

item.title: MambaByte (Cornell)
item.description: Parameters: 0.972B License: closed Type: model Used bytes instead of tokens. 4 bytes≈1 token, so 150B bytes≈37.5B tokens

item.title: DeepSeekMoE (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: 16B License: closed Type: model MoE activated parameters is 10-15% of dense, so I need to rethink ALScore for MoE. 'preliminary efforts to scale up DeepSeekMoE to 145B'

item.title: DocLLM (JPMorgan)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: closed Type: model Document spatial layout structure.

item.title: WaveCoder-DS-6.7B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 6.7B License: closed Type: model To obtain WaveCoder models, We choose StarCoder-15B, CodeLLaMa (7B and 13B), DeepseekCoder-6.7B as the base model and fine-tune all the base model for 3 epochs

item.title: YunShan (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: closed Type: model Finance + law fine-tune of PanGu-π

item.title: PanGu-Pi (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: closed Type: model Dense, named PanGu-π

item.title: LVM-3B (Berkeley/JHU)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model Paper is 25MB. First Large Vision Model (LVM); no text. Based on Llama and LAION 5B (1.49B).

item.title: Q-Transformer (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: closed Type: model Robotics, builds on RT-1

item.title: Transformers-Arithmetic (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 0.1B License: closed Type: model Proving maths is not memorized. Uses GPT-2-style model. Sébastien Bubeck

item.title: Nemotron-2 43B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 43B License: closed Type: model Used to train HelpSteer (16/Nov/2023): https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.09528

item.title: Mirasol3B (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model Combiner + autoregressive transformer for video/audio/text

item.title: Grok-0 (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: 33B License: closed Type: model Announced Nov/2023, trained Jul/2023

item.title: PaLI-3 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 5B License: closed Type: model VLM. Next iteration of PaLI via Pathways. https://lifearchitect.ai/pathways/

item.title: MotionLM (Waymo)
item.description: Parameters: 0.09B License: closed Type: model LLM for autonomous vehicle forecasting. https://youtu.be/jrMMNmN21I8?t=1560

item.title: GAIA-1 (Wayve)
item.description: Parameters: 9B License: closed Type: model World model, generates video. Uses T5-large 770M for language + all vision parameters

item.title: Llama 2 Long (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model Unreleased to date. Context window=32,768 tokens (compare to Llama 2=4096 tokens)

item.title: Kosmos-2.5 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: closed Type: model

item.title: Raven (UI/NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 11B License: closed Type: model RAG Atlas

item.title: Med-PaLM M (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model Uses PaLM 1. Already outperformed by Med-PaLM 2. Med-PaLM Multimodal (Med-PaLM M).

item.title: xTrimoPGLM (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: closed Type: model Protein language model

item.title: AudioPaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: closed Type: model a unified multimodal architecture that can process and generate text and speech with applications including speech recognition and speech-to-speech translation

item.title: Phi-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: closed Type: model Code model. ‘breaking existing scaling laws by training a 1.3B-parameter model, which we call phi-1, for roughly 8 passes over 7B tokens (slightly over 50B total tokens seen) followed by finetuning on less than 200M tokens.’

item.title: InternLM (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 104B License: closed Type: model Outperforms ChatGPT, LLaMA on RACE-h, Chinese + English

item.title: PassGPT (ETH Zürich)
item.description: License: closed Type: model GPT-2 trained on leaked passwords

item.title: DIDACT (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: closed Type: model Iterative coding model trained on Google's monorepo. Jacob: https://twitter.com/jacobaustin132/status/1663972128176128002

item.title: LTM-1 (Magic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model Context window=5M

item.title: GPT-4 MathMix (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 1760B License: closed Type: model Unreleased, includes step by step research

item.title: LIMA (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 65B License: closed Type: model LLaMA-65B with nearly no fine-tuning, no RLHF

item.title: BloombergGPT (Bloomberg)
item.description: Parameters: 50B License: closed Type: model Video: https://youtu.be/m2Scj2SO85Y Underperforms GPT-3, based on BLOOM. Tokens: 'We select a model size motivated by Hoffmann et al. (2022) and train a 50 billion parameter model on 569 billion tokens from our corpus of over 700 billion tokens to produce a model that is competitive with larger models.'

item.title: PanGu-Sigma (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 1085B License: closed Type: model Sparse. 1.085T parameters named PanGu-Σ.

item.title: CoLT5 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 5.2B License: closed Type: model up to 64k context window [48k words or about 96 pages -Alan]

item.title: Med-PaLM 2 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: closed Type: model Recently, our next iteration, Med-PaLM 2, consistently performed at an “expert” doctor level on medical exam questions, scoring 85%. This is an 18% improvement from Med-PaLM’s previous performance and far surpasses similar AI models.

item.title: Kosmos-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.6B License: closed Type: model Proto-AGI. Multimodal large language model (MLLM). Raven’s Progressive Matrices as real images, not digits as in testing of text-davinci-003 at https://lifearchitect.ai/ravens/

item.title: Toolformer+Atlas 11B+NLLB 54B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 6.7B License: closed Type: model Based on GPT-J 6.7B + access to other models via API

item.title: FLAME (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 0.06B License: closed Type: model T5 for Excel formulas, very small 60M params, "We start from a dataset of 927M formulas" estimate 10x multiplier for 9B tokens

item.title: Med-PaLM 1 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model Collab between Google & DeepMind. Makes 1% less errors than humans

item.title: RL-CAI (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 52B License: closed Type: model RLAIF=reinforcement learning with AI feedback

item.title: RT-1 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.035B License: closed Type: model

item.title: SED (DeepMind)
item.description: License: closed Type: model SED 420M (diffusion text model)

item.title: Flan-PaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model

item.title: U-PaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model

item.title: Sparrow (DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model Chatbot as a fine-tuned version of Chinchilla 70B

item.title: PaLI (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 17B License: closed Type: model PaLM Vision model, new datasets of 10B multilingual text-image pairs

item.title: Z-Code++ (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 0.71B License: closed Type: model abstractive text summarization, 710M, outperforms PaLM 540B. "Due to the limited computational resource, Z-Code++LARGE is trained with only 500B tokens instead of 1T tokens as that for mT5 training."

item.title: 6.9B FIM (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 6.9B License: closed Type: model Several models: 8 sizes, NLP, Code, FIM/non-FIM. 100B tokens for 6.9B params... beyond chinchilla

item.title: ‘monorepo-Transformer’ (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.5B License: closed Type: model Unnamed. Writes >3% of internal google code.

item.title: PanGu-Coder (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 2.6B License: closed Type: model Python via GH

item.title: Minerva (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model PaLM finetuned on LaTeX/arXiv maths

item.title: Unified-IO (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: 2.8B License: closed Type: model Based on T5. Demo only

item.title: Perceiver AR (DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1B License: closed Type: model Context window=100,000. Params=364m wiki, 975M pg-19, 826M books, music=?, imagenet=770M,

item.title: LIMoE (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 5.6B License: closed Type: model

item.title: UL2 20B (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: closed Type: model Unifying Language model. C4 only.

item.title: Gato (Cat) (DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1B License: closed Type: model Proto-AGI. Generalist agent (LLM, VLM, robot)

item.title: NOOR (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: closed Type: model Arabic. "World’s largest high-quality cross-domain Arabic dataset, combining web data with books, poetry, news articles, and technical information"

item.title: PaLM-Coder (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model

item.title: PaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model

item.title: Chinchilla (DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model First to double tokens per size increase

item.title: Gopher (DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 280B License: closed Type: model Dataset: https://lifearchitect.ai/whats-in-my-ai/

item.title: GLaM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 1200B License: closed Type: model

item.title: Anthropic-LM 52B (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 52B License: closed Type: model Internal research only

item.title: RETRO (DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 7.5B License: closed Type: model with retrieval

item.title: BERT-480 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 480B License: closed Type: model Submission to benchmarks. Original dataset was BookCorpus + Wikipedia: https://arxiv.org/pdf/1810.04805.pdf

item.title: BERT-200 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model Submission to benchmarks. Original dataset was BookCorpus + Wikipedia: https://arxiv.org/pdf/1810.04805.pdf

item.title: MT-NLG (Microsoft/NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 530B License: closed Type: model

item.title: FLAN (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 137B License: closed Type: model Fine-tuned LaMDA

item.title: LaMDA (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 137B License: closed Type: model Chatbot

item.title: Transformer++ (American Express)
item.description: Parameters: 0.212B License: closed Type: model Not to be confused with the more common usage of Transformer++, the ~2023 Transformer++ based on Llama. See Mamba paper.

item.title: Meena (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 2.6B License: closed Type: model Dialogue model. Trained 61B tokens for 164x epochs to 10T tokens!
